attributes.title: Payloads — note
attributes.visState: {"title": "Payloads \u2014 note", "type": "markdown", "params": {"markdown": "### Payload Explorer\nEvery file a C2 served (`evidence:served_file`). **Click a sha256** in the File Catalog \u2192 *Filter for value* to see every C2 and sensor that served that exact artifact (cross-sensor dedupe). Script source is the document itself. VirusTotal Verdicts joins the fleet-wide `c2-vt` cache (one row per sha256).", "openLinksInNewTab": false, "fontSize": 12}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Payload Explorer
